entry.title: Department of the Treasury - Treasury, Departmental Offices - Associate Chief Information Officer for Security Operations (ES 00)
entry.content:
Treasury is hiring for their ACIO overseeing their enterprise SOC. This is a Senior Executive Service position and you’ll need an SES-formatted resume with ECQs and TQs to apply.

Salary $147,649-$221,900

Closes 2024.03.28

Apply
